positive: A whimsical storybook illustration of a small fox befriending a glowing firefly in a misty, enchanted forest. The style should be highly detailed watercolor painting, featuring soft pastels, deep greens, and magical bioluminescence. Studio Ghibli aesthetic, storybook art, soft lighting, hyper-detailed.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
